help: Starts a Cosmicon dice battle. Without arguments, starts a standard random battle. opponentId: character to fight (random for random). prismaticDiceId: prismatic dice for opponent. useTrue: true/false. tutorialGameNum: 1 or 2.
Completes the Cosmicon tutorial (sets games played to 2, unlocks Sparxie, Acheron, and Repeater non-true).
Resets Cosmicon progress. all: reset everything (default). stats: reset games played/won. unlocks: reset unlocked chars/dice. player: reset selected character/dice.

Unlocks Cosmicon characters or prismatic dice. cosmicon_unlock char <id> or 'all' to unlock characters. cosmicon_unlock prismatic [all] (no arg = non-true only, 'all' = all dice). Use 'cosmicon_unlock all' to unlock everything.
Shows current Cosmicon stats: games played/won, unlocks, selected character, tutorial status. verbose: also lists all unlocks and config.
Shows or modifies Cosmicon config values. Without args: show all config. set <key> <value>: change config at runtime (marketSizeMin, defaultHP, defaultRerolls, debugEnabled).
Starts an 8-player double-elimination tournament. Clears any existing tournament state first.
Starts a gatekeeper battle vs Trashcan. bonusHp: bonus HP for Trashcan (default: 74).
Shows casino collab status: Trashcan Hunter Level, locked reward pools, current battle state, and potential boss rewards.
Resets casino collab state. all: reset everything (default). hunter: reset Trashcan Hunter Level. battle: reset casino battle state. tournament: reset tournament state.
Toggles AI reroll decision logging. Logs frozen dice, reduced pool sizes, candidate counts, exact vs Monte Carlo paths during AI reroll evaluation.
Sets debug logging level. off: all disabled. debug: battle flow/damage/status. verbose: +AI internals/dice rest/animations. reroll: toggle AI reroll log.
Forces an instant player victory in the current Cosmicon battle.
